<<THE RESEARCH ASSISTANT IS DESIGNING AN EXPERIMENT TO TEST THE EFFECTIVENESS OF A NEW DRUG ON REDUCING BLOOD PRESSURE>>  

1. [DERIVE THE MAXIMUM LIKELIHOOD ESTIMATORS FOR THE PARAMETERS MU_X, MU_Y, SIGMA_X_SQ, SIGMA_Y_SQ, AND SIGMA_XY GIVEN THE DATA]  

2. [FORMULATE AND CONDUCT A HYPOTHESIS TEST USING THE DERIVED MLEs. STATE THE NULL AND ALTERNATIVE HYPOTHESES, THE TEST STATISTIC, AND THE REJECTION CRITERIA AT A SIGNIFICANCE LEVEL OF ALPHA EQUAL TO 0.05. THE RESPONSE MUST CONTAIN AT LEAST 8 PLACEHOLDERS REPRESENTED BY SQUARE BRACKETS SUCH AS ADDRESS]  

[THE NULL HYPOTHESIS IS THAT THE DRUG HAS NO EFFECT ON REDUCING BLOOD PRESSURE. THE ALTERNATIVE HYPOTHESIS IS THAT THE DRUG DOES HAVE AN EFFECT ON REDUCING BLOOD PRESSURE. THE TEST STATISTIC IS THE SAMPLE MEAN DIFFERENCE BETWEEN PRE-TREATMENT AND POST-TREATMENT BLOOD PRESSURE. THE REJECTION CRITERIA IS THAT THE TEST STATISTIC IS GREATER THAN THE Critical Value AT A SIGNIFICANCE LEVEL OF 0.05. THE RESPONSE MUST CONTAIN AT LEAST 8 PLACEHOLDERS REPRESENTED BY SQUARE BRACKETS SUCH AS ADDRESS]
